summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pi Monitor dashboard with Grafana-like dark theme. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly with mock data.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/metrics/host returns complete host metrics (CPU, RAM, Load, Temperature)
Backend API /api/metrics/containers returns array of 6 containers with full metrics
Backend API /api/metrics/all returns combined host and container data
Dashboard loads with correct dark theme (#050505 background)
Host metrics section displays all 4 metrics (CPU, RAM, Load Average, Temperature) with proper values
Container metrics section displays all 6 containers (nginx, postgres, redis, grafana, prometheus, cadvisor)
CPU and RAM history charts are displayed and functional
Live indicator is present and pulsing with CSS animation
Refresh interval selector works with all options (2s, 3s, 5s, 10s)
Data auto-refreshes successfully - values update every refresh interval
Container cards show correct status (running/stopped) with color coding
Network traffic (RX/TX) displayed for all running containers
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
Mock data generation working as expected
